title: The Boys' Candidate
content:
Las' time 'at Uncle Sidney come,
    He bringed a watermelon home -
         An' half the boys in town,
    Come taggin' after him. - An' he
    Says, when we et it, - "Gracious me!
         'S the boy-house fell down?"
meaning:
This evocative piece by James Whitcomb Riley, titled "The Boys' Candidate", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
